CustomField.description: Filter by owner manager. MIS-795 MIS-3359
CustomField.formula:
CASE( Owner.Manager.FirstName ,
"Rachel",DATE(2021,4,4) , "Omri", DATE (2021,5,5), "Ryan", DATE(2021, 9, 9), "Kyle", DATE(2021, 8, 8), "Hadas", DATE(2021, 11, 11), "Manuela", DATE(2021, 12, 12), "Matt", DATE(2022, 1, 1), "Shannon", DATE(2022, 2, 2), "Joshua", DATE(2022,3,3), "Shoshana", DATE(2022,4,4), "Christofer", DATE(2022,5,5), "Ohad", DATE(2023,1,1), "Ido", DATE(2023,2,2),
DATE(2020,1,1) )
CustomField.label: SDR/MIR Team Leader
